fields.name: Deferral Doc. Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether this refers to a document of type Sales, Purchase or G/L.

fields.name: Gen. Jnl. Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the General Journal Template Name for lines with a Deferral Doc. Type of G/L.

fields.name: Gen. Jnl. Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the General Journal Batch Name for lines with a Deferral Doc. Type of G/L.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Document Type for lines with a Deferral Doc. Type of Sales or Purchase.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies Document No. for lines with a Deferral Doc. Type of Sales or Purchase.

fields.name: Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net amount in your local currency.
